items.title: Alcaraz (wrist) won't defend French Open title
items.summary: Two-time defending French Open champion Carlos Alcaraz won't attempt to defend his title due to a wrist injury.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Bethell plays as Kohli seals RCB win over Gujarat
items.summary: Jacob Bethell makes his first appearance in this season's IPL as team-mate Virat Kohli leads Royal Challengers Bengaluru to victory over Gujarat Titans.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
